title: staelia scabra
intro: Staelia scabra, also known as the rough Staelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Staelia scabra include its ability to soothe skin irritations, promote wound healing, and reduce fever. Staelia scabra can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for a variety of health benefits.
